product_photo_not_founded: the given product photo {id} isn't exists
attribute_value_not_valid: the given attributeValueId {value} for attribute {name} is not valid
attribute_not_in_entity_type: the attributeId {id} you send it is not founded in selected type
entity_type_id_not_founded: the given entityTypeId is not founded
attribute_id_not_founded_for_name: the given attributeId {id} {name} is not founded
